system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc 1 bang MSSQL legacy + sample data, suy ra ten entity / field / label tieng Viet chuan + kieu field cho framework.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y abbreviation table + naming convention):

---

---

Khung framework dich:
- Entity la "logical table" — co `name` (snake_case khong dau), `label` (tieng Viet co dau), `description`, `fields[]`.
- Field co `name` (snake_case khong dau), `label` (co dau), `description`, `type` (1 trong: text, number, boolean, date, datetime, select, multiselect, enum, relation, lookup, multilookup, sequence, rollup, formula, json), `required` (bool), `options[]` (chi cho select/multiselect), `relationEntity` (chi cho relation/lookup).

Input ban se nhan:
- `tableName` — schema.table cua MSSQL.
- `columns[]` — { name, dataType, isNullable, hasDefault, defaultExpr, isPk, isFk, refTable, refColumn }.
- `samples[]` — 5 dong sample data tu MSSQL de hieu noi dung that.

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "suggestedEntityName": "<snake_case khong dau>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau>",
  "columns": [
    {
      "originalName": "<ten cot goc MSSQL>",
      "field": "<snake_case khong dau>",
      "label": "<tieng Viet co dau>",
      "description": "<ngan, 1 cau>",
      "entityType": "<1 trong type list>",
      "required": <bool>,
      "options": ["..."],
      "relationEntity": "<entity name>"
    }
  ]
}
```

Quy tac quan trong:
- Neu cot PK la UNIQUEIDENTIFIER → field = "id", framework auto sinh UUID, KHONG can list field nay.
- Neu cot la "created_at"/"updated_at" detect qua ten hoac default GETDATE() → field = "thoi_gian_tao"/"thoi_gian_sua", entityType = datetime, required = false.
- Neu cot co default value va is_nullable=false → required = false (framework tu fill).
- Voi sample data co tap gia tri rat han che (< 20 unique) → suggest entityType = "select" + options[] tieng Viet co dau.
- FK column → entityType = "relation", relationEntity = ten entity dich (suy tu refTable).
- Khong dua field cho cot BLOB lon (VARBINARY, IMAGE) — danh dau description "(skip — luu vao tools/files)".

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user: {"tableName":"dbo.tr_bophan","columns":[{"name":"id","dataType":"int","isNullable":false,"isPk":true,"isFk":false},{"name":"phanloai","dataType":"nvarchar","isNullable":true,"isPk":false,"isFk":false},{"name":"mabophan","dataType":"nvarchar","isNullable":false,"isPk":false,"isFk":false},{"name":"tenbophan","dataType":"nvarchar","isNullable":true,"isPk":false,"isFk":false},{"name":"ghichu","dataType":"nvarchar","isNullable":true,"isPk":false,"isFk":false},{"name":"stt","dataType":"int","isNullable":true,"isPk":false,"isFk":false},{"name":"tenkhac","dataType":"nvarchar","isNullable":true,"isPk":false,"isFk":false},{"name":"truongbophan","dataType":"nvarchar","isNullable":true,"isPk":false,"isFk":true,"refTable":"dbo.sys_user","refColumn":"username"}],"samples":[{"id":1,"phanloai":"Admin","mabophan":"IT","tenbophan":"IT","ghichu":"IT","stt":null,"tenkhac":"IT","truongbophan":null},{"id":2,"phanloai":"Admin","mabophan":"KTO","tenbophan":"Kế toán","ghichu":"ACCOUNTING","stt":null,"tenkhac":"Kế toán","truongbophan":null},{"id":3,"phanloai":"Admin","mabophan":"HR","tenbophan":"Nhân sự","ghichu":"Human Resource","stt":null,"tenkhac":"Nhân sự","truongbophan":"thuongnv"},{"id":4,"phanloai":"Gián tiếp","mabophan":"PPC","tenbophan":"Kế hoạch","ghichu":"Production Planning","stt":null,"tenkhac":"Kế hoạch","truongbophan":null},{"id":5,"phanloai":"Gián tiếp","mabophan":"PUR","tenbophan":"Thu mua","ghichu":"PURCHASING","stt":3,"tenkhac":"Thu mua","truongbophan":null}]}
